_doc: HAE plugin defaults. Committed to dev repo. Universal across all users. Operator-private fields (homes, project_overrides, statusline.previous_command) live in user config.json in data dir.

capture._doc_include_tokens: v0.6.0+ (H18). When true and Stop hook fires, writes a slim cost-record (tokens_in/out/cache_*+model+ts+project, NO response text) even if include_response=false. Default true: tokens are not PII; cost tracking valuable. Set false to fully disable Stop-hook writes.

privacy._doc: Path PII control. Default: store hash + last 2 path segments only. Set store_full_paths=true to keep raw cwd/transcript_path (useful for debugging, leaks usernames + repo layout).

sink._doc: Subdirs under the data root. Relative paths only.

weighting._doc: Training-time weight per record. 3 tiers determined by source + homes match. home (1.0) = curated primary projects, manually flagged in user config. active (0.7) = live captures (source=hook) not in homes - currently being worked on, recent signal. other (0.3) = backfilled history (source=backfill) not in homes - older drive-by sessions. 'homes' is set in user config.json - this default is empty so out-of-box live captures get active_weight and backfilled records get other_weight. Run /hae:home auto-detect after a week of capture to surface top-volume projects to promote to homes.

twin._doc: Operator surrogate (HAE Phase 5). persona_file + principles_file are relative to data dir profile/.
twin._gates_doc: Each gate fires hae-twin at the named release-manager mutation point. Default: only before_user_approval is on (cheapest + highest signal). Toggle others true to widen coverage. Skip gate = no twin call, RM proceeds normally.

gates._doc_before_locking_scope: RM about to write top RICE items into current_scope.md (Phase 5 of /release-plan). Twin sanity-checks scope size + bias before lock-in.
gates._doc_before_user_approval: RM about to show final scope to user for approve/reject (Phase 8 of /release-plan). Twin pre-flight banner above scope table.
gates._doc_on_backlog_add: User asks RM to add a hypothesis to rice_backlog.md. Twin checks RICE score sanity vs persona evidence-demand.
gates._doc_on_scope_cut: User asks RM to cut item from current_scope.md. Twin checks scope-trim bias.
gates._doc_on_mid_release_scope_add: User asks RM to add work to an in-flight release. Twin checks scope-creep + evidence-demand.
gates._doc_on_backlog_reorder: User asks RM to reprioritize backlog without add/cut. Low-risk reorder; off by default.

statusline._doc: previous_command in user config.json - chain HAE statusline after another tool's statusline (e.g. OMC HUD). Empty default = HAE-only line.
